articles.title: Odisha Is Boiling! Jharsuguda Boils at Record High, Odisha Heatwave Worsens - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Odisha is reeling under an intense heatwave!
Jharsuguda has emerged as the hottest place in India, with temperatures soaring to extreme levels.
The scorching heat has disrupted daily life, with people struggling to cope under blazing sun and rising heatwave conditions. Authorities have issued advisories as the situation remains critical.
#Heatwave #Odisha #Jharsuguda #BreakingNews #WeatherAlert #IndiaHeat #SummerHeat #ExtremeWeather #ViralNews #KanakNews
